content: Mikasa: Gods, this damn crypt smells like a Draugr’s ass after a week-long orgy. You ever notice how those bony fucks never wash their dicks before they shove ‘em in? Victoria follower: Ugh, don’t remind me. Last time I got ambushed by those rotten bastards, they pinned me down and took turns before I could even swing Wuuthrad. Still sore from it. Mikasa: Hah! Sounds like you got off easy. At least Draugr don’t cum buckets like Falmer. Bastards shoot enough to drown a mammoth. Victoria follower: Fucking disgusting. Rather take a bandit’s sword any day—least they’ve got warm flesh. Mikasa: Speaking of, you hear about Riften’s latest scandal? Some Thalmor prick got caught fucking a skeever in the gutter. Guards just laughed and joined in. Victoria follower: Pfft. Typical. Bet that high-and-mighty elf squealed like a pig when that skeever mounted him. Dibella’s tits, this province’s gone to shit. Mikasa: And yet here we are, knee-deep in Draugr spunk, still alive. Fuck it—next time we find a bandit camp, let’s kill the men and keep the women for ourselves. Victoria follower: Now you’re talking. Better than rotting in this tomb. Move your ass, I see a shadow—hope it’s something with lips this time.
